2025/26 Season

I’m grateful that you are a part of A.C.T. and that you take your theater seriously. Whether for just this past season or for these last 58 years, A.C.T.’s subscribers make possible our theater seasons rich in artistic talent, deep provocation, and simple fun. You’re an important part of the cultural and entertainment ecosystem, informing what is on our stages and what stories get talked about around the Bay.

The 2025/26 season holds a lot of laughter, many a gasp, and maybe a tear, as characters search for belonging and for themselves.

I hope you will join us for the entire season! See you at the theater.

 

Pam MacKinnon
Artistic Director 

Kim’s Convenience

SEP 18–OCT 19, 2025

A.C.T.'s Annual Gala

Stereophonic

OCT 28–NOV 23, 2025

A Streetcar Named Desire

JAN 21–FEB 1, 2026

Paranormal Activity

FEB 19–MAR 22, 2026

||: GIRLS :||: CHANCE :||: MUSIC :||

Hamnet

APR 22–MAY 24, 2026
